blocks.content: Etela touched her lips thoughtfully.

blocks.speaker: Etela
blocks.content: Then would you like to demonstrate in the Image Zone?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What? Now?

blocks.speaker: Etela
blocks.content: Why? Not feeling well?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No, that's not it, but...
Etela blinked in confusion.
The enthusiastic student who had wanted to use the Image Zone from the first day of class had recently become passive in lessons.

blocks.speaker: Etela
blocks.content: What's happening? He doesn't look good. The children seem to be antagonizing him—is that why? He's more sensitive than I thought.
Etela patted his shoulder and said:

blocks.speaker: Etela
blocks.content: If you're not feeling well, we can do it next time. You're the only one in Class Seven who can change the Four Direction Formation, so I just wanted to see it once.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No, I'll try it. Please evaluate me.
Shirone entered the Image Zone, insults flew at him.

blocks.speaker: Class Seven students
blocks.content: Oh? Looks like he's going to do it again? So desperate for attention.

blocks.speaker: Class Seven students
blocks.content: Probably wants to impress his girlfriend. I mean, that's all he can do, right? He can't do any magic at all.
The senior students stopped their practice and turned to watch.
A month had passed since he succeeded with the defensive form of the Four Direction Formation, so they were curious about how much he had grown.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Teacher, I'm starting.

blocks.speaker: Etela
blocks.content: Alright. Let's go one by one.
Shirone demonstrated his specialty, the defensive form. A massive cube was created with a strong appearance.

blocks.speaker: Senior students
blocks.content: Just looking at the defensive form, he's upper class level. That's almost armor level.
Shirone deployed the Four Direction Formation in offensive form. The zone's size decreased, but numerous spikes protruded menacingly.
Next was the target form. The length of the cross was considerable, but the rotation was weak for practical use.
Nevertheless, it was not an exaggeration to describe it as rapid progress.
Etela smiled with satisfaction. Soon he could be promoted early to Class Six.
Shirone didn't stop there and attempted the departure form.
It was important to fail too if he wanted to receive advice from Etela.
Predictably, he encountered obstacles. The Spirit Zone's shape would change, or even when he moved the center, the zone would burst just before departure.
Etela's eyes lit up with surprise.
She hadn't even expected him to try, given their opposing inclinations, yet he was getting fairly close.
The children of Class Seven, who didn't even think of attempting the departure form, each breathed sighs of relief.

blocks.speaker: Class Seven students
blocks.content: Hehehe, what's he doing? Is that supposed to be a Four Direction Formation? Just child's play.

blocks.speaker: Class Seven students
blocks.content: Some genius he is. Not even good at one thing. How does he expect to become a wizard like this?
Shirone felt upset.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Not a single person in Class Seven could manage the departure form. He couldn't understand the mindset of applying standards to others that they themselves couldn't meet.
As he lost his composure, his Spirit Zone wobbled.
This only encouraged his classmates, who didn't stop badmouthing him in an effort to bring him down.
Amy, watching the demonstration, frowned.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What's wrong with him? What is he doing? The formation conversion had been satisfactory, but suddenly the zone was shaking.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What's wrong with him? What is he doing?

blocks.speaker: Seriel
blocks.content: The departure form is naturally difficult. He seems too concerned with the children's reactions.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: No way. He's not the type to be shaken by that. Is something really going on?

blocks.speaker: Seriel
blocks.content: Oh my, defending him? Well, of course, he is your man after all.
Amy silenced Seriel with a red face and fell into thought.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Something was definitely wrong. Where was the endurance that had overcome Anti-Magic? His Spirit Zone was wobbling like a drunk person.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Is there really something I don't know about?
Shirone struggled to suppress his emotions.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why do they hate me so much? What did I do wrong? I just want to learn hard and do better. What's wrong with wanting to become a wizard?
His Spirit Zone began to fluctuate violently, as if about to burst at any moment.

blocks.speaker: A Class Five student
blocks.content: Hey, you're thinking too much.
Shirone suddenly awoke from his thoughts.

blocks.speaker: A Class Five student
blocks.content: If there's something you want to do, just do it. You came here to learn magic, right?
Shirone finally looked at his state coolly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What was I doing?
Having cleared his distractions, Shirone attempted the departure form.
Whether he failed or succeeded, it was fine. What mattered was taking a step forward through the attempt.
The 40-meter diameter zone slowly began to move away from its center.
As the center distanced, the diameter decreased exponentially.
Which comes first, departure or dissolution?
All the advanced class students stared intently at the scene.
By the time the zone had shrunk to a diameter of 2 meters, the surface of the Spirit Zone completely detached from Shirone's body.
Class Seven students were indescribably shocked.
He had succeeded at a technique difficult even for advanced class seniors.
The Spirit Zone began to rapidly orbit around Shirone.
Every moment, new information flooded in.
The massive amount of information nearly made his head explode.
When he blinked his eyes wide open, the Spirit Zone popped and disappeared.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Haa, haa.
He was out of breath despite having done nothing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I did it. I really... succeeded with the departure form.
The upper class began to stir.
It was an achievement incomparable to succeeding with the defensive form.
Not only in Class Seven but also in Class Six, no one had succeeded with the departure form.

blocks.speaker: Seriel
blocks.content: Amy, Shirone did it! He really did it!
Amy was smiling too.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Regardless of her feelings, it was a talent worthy of respect as a colleague pursuing the same dream.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: His growth speed is incredible. No, it's way too fast. If he can succeed with the departure form in a month, surely...

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: A talent matching mine. Or even beyond.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Why... did I waste precious time so futilely?
After succeeding with the departure form, Shirone looked around the Class Five area for the owner of the advice.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I wanted to thank them...
Etela, watching Shirone receive applause, fell into thought.

blocks.speaker: Etela
blocks.content: Everyone was stimulated by Shirone's growth.

blocks.speaker: Etela
blocks.content: She thought of a way to further invigorate the class atmosphere.

blocks.speaker: Etela
blocks.content: Hmm, it came earlier than expected.
Recently, Shirone had one private concern.
He didn't know how to use any magic at all.
The knowledge needed for magic wasn't something that lower class children could easily acquire.
That's why the school only began practical magic training from Class Five.
But reality was different.
Nobles received education from birth, so even lower class students knew how to use at least one magic spell.
In contrast, Shirone's study period was only the 1 year and 6 months he spent with the Ozent family.
Shirone's dilemma was here.
If he focused on one discipline, he might be able to use simple magic.
But he could never surpass students who had been educated from childhood if he followed the same approach.
That's how he arrived at the strategy of studying entire fields and their derivative disciplines together.
As a result, he had to borrow so many books that these days he practically lived in the library.
Students ridiculed Shirone for this.
They thought it was stupid to study so haphazardly when he couldn't even keep up with current classes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But Shirone didn't change his mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: With a backbone of knowledge, any discipline could be arranged according to time sequence.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This meant the probability of forgetting content was significantly reduced.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The immediate results might be minimal. But at least 2 years. If I can study like this for 2 years, all the core knowledge in each field will connect.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This would be the framework of knowledge.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It meant having an entire encyclopedia of information in his head, accessible for any information.
Shirone immersed himself in books with renewed determination.
When he regained awareness, it was well past midnight.
The only person left in the reading room was a girl from Class Six.
As Shirone nodded slightly while packing his bag, she returned a shy smile.
When he left the library, it was 2 AM.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Even if he went in now, he could only sleep for about 4 hours.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But when he thought about how he was behind in studies compared to children from noble families, even sleep seemed wasteful.
At such times, Shirone recalled a book he had once read called 'Dialogues of Great Scholars'.
Particularly impressive was an interview with a biologist named Torkoklin.

blocks.speaker: Torkoklin
blocks.content: Of course, I only slept 4 hours during my school days.

blocks.speaker: The author of the book
blocks.content: Then isn't your research finding wrong? You became an outstanding scholar despite sleeping only 4 hours.

blocks.speaker: Torkoklin
blocks.content: Haha! Teenagers are not human. They are superhumans. Sleeping or not probably makes no difference to them.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: For Shirone, who was pressed for time, these words were a great encouragement.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Right! Let's work hard. If I do my best, results will follow.
The graduation class building had its lights on.
The windows flickered, perhaps from late-night magic experiments.
What new magic was being created in there?
Shirone's gaze was already set on the graduation class.
As lunch time was ending, Etela came looking for Siina.
At 26 years old, they were the same age and had worked together for 4 years, but they still spoke formally to each other.

blocks.speaker: Etela
blocks.content: Teacher Siina, could you spare some time?

blocks.speaker: Siina
blocks.content: Yes. But I have a Class Seven lesson scheduled, so I won't be able to talk for long.

blocks.speaker: Siina
blocks.content: Discussing magic often took more than an hour, so Siina apologized in advance.

blocks.speaker: Etela
blocks.content: Ah, I see. I wanted to discuss something about Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Siina
blocks.content: How's he doing these days? I saw his practical scores were quite high.

blocks.speaker: Etela
blocks.content: They certainly are. Last time, he even succeeded with the departure form of the Four Direction Formation.

blocks.speaker: Siina
blocks.content: Oh, I see.
Siina smiled contentedly.

blocks.speaker: Etela
blocks.content: So I wanted to make a suggestion to you, Teacher Siina.

blocks.speaker: Siina
blocks.content: A suggestion?
It was quite rare for Etela to make recommendations to another teacher about a student.
Expecting something dramatic, Siina blinked her eyes.
The blackboard in Class Seven's classroom was filled with chemical theory.
The students busily moved their eyes and hands, taking notes.
The lesson seemed faster than usual today.
As expected, Siina ended the class about 10 minutes early and stepped down from the podium.

blocks.speaker: Siina
blocks.content: That's all for today. Instead, I have an announcement.
The students were magnanimous.

blocks.speaker: Siina
blocks.content: An early promotion candidate has been decided. Arian Shirone, please stand up.
Shirone was startled by the sudden announcement of early promotion.
Meanwhile, his classmates wore displeased expressions.
Early promotion wasn't particularly rare.
But the problem was that Shirone was the candidate.

blocks.speaker: Siina
blocks.content: Student Shirone will be promoted to Class Five. From tomorrow, please attend classes according to their schedule.

blocks.speaker: Siina
blocks.content: I hope all of you will also strive harder for opportunities. That is all.
